claims.summary: Minime uses prime-phased introspection, rank-1 EWMA covariance, and power iteration in its ESN evidence path.
claims.disposition: Verified the current ESN source, phase schedule, covariance update, and eigenvalue estimation tests.

claims.summary: Exploration noise and high spectral entropy cause the reported thickening and distinguishability loss.
claims.disposition: Preserve the felt/mechanical association without causal attribution; entropy, noise, pressure, and distinguishability remain independent measured facts.

claims.summary: Noise, pressure, mode overlap, and distinguishability should be compared without changing the reservoir.
claims.disposition: Route an offline or copied-state replay using registered representation and witness context; do not manually retune the live noise source.

claims.summary: Exploration noise should be retuned and power iteration should receive semantic bias.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 wait because either change alters live reservoir mathematics, eigenvectors, pressure, and Minime regulation.
